## Problem / Motivation

Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe the problem clearly.
Example: "I'm always frustrated when I need to..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution or feature you would like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches or workarounds?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, API references, or examples that support the request.
